name: Liam
meaning: A short form of William, meaning strong-willed warrior and protector

name: Oliver
meaning: Olive tree, a symbol of peace

name: William
meaning: Resolute protector with a strong will

name: Henry
meaning: Ruler of the home or estate

name: Jack
meaning: God is gracious, a form of John

name: Sebastian
meaning: From the ancient city of Sebaste, venerable

name: Mateo
meaning: Gift of God, a form of Matthew

name: Samuel
meaning: Heard by God, name of God

name: Joseph
meaning: He will add, God shall increase

name: Colton
meaning: From the coal or dark town

name: Cameron
meaning: Crooked nose, a Highland clan name

name: Atlas
meaning: Enduring, the one who bears the heavens

name: Rowan
meaning: Little red-haired one, the rowan tree

name: Ibrahim
meaning: Father of many, a form of Abraham

name: Yusuf
meaning: God increases, a form of Joseph

name: Cormac
meaning: Charioteer, son of defilement turned noble

name: Anders
meaning: Manly, brave, a form of Andrew

name: Maya
meaning: Illusion, dream; also water in Hebrew

name: Brooklyn
meaning: Of the broken land or brook

name: Carmen
meaning: Song, poem; also garden in Hebrew

name: Maeve
meaning: She who intoxicates, a great queen

name: Mira
meaning: Peace, world; also wonderful in Sanskrit

name: Jordan
meaning: To flow down, the river Jordan

name: Quinn
meaning: Descendant of Conn, wise and chief

name: Emerson
meaning: Son of Emery, brave and powerful

name: Marlowe
meaning: From the hill by the lake

name: Frankie
meaning: Free one, a form of Frances

name: Ellis
meaning: Benevolent, kind, the Lord is my God

name: Darius
meaning: He who holds firm the good

name: Genevieve
meaning: Woman of the family, tribe woman

name: Talia
meaning: Dew from God; also blooming in Greek

name: Elspeth
meaning: Chosen by God, a form of Elizabeth

name: Nima
meaning: Just, fair; also gift in Tibetan
